title: About Jasmin
open_source_body: This software is open source and available under the GNU AGPLv3 license.
feature_cooperative_desc: Member register, entry & exit dates, cooperative shares and payback per GenG.
feature_bio_desc: Articles and shares can be cleanly marked as organic or in conversion.
feature_gdpr_desc: Subject access (Art. 15) & erasure (Art. 17) with statutory retention windows, encrypted personal data, full audit log, versioned & hash-verified consents.
feature_a11y_desc: Keyboard operation, screen-reader labels, clear contrast, light/dark mode.
feature_delivery_desc: Share types & sizes, pickup stations & tours, weekly deliveries, jokers to pause and opt-in for individual deliveries.
feature_cultivation_desc: Sowing, planting and harvest planning — with forecasts that feed the weekly deliveries.
feature_economics_desc: Budgets, prices and financial analysis across the season.
feature_staff_desc: Coordinate staff shifts and tasks — with a weekly overview.
feature_sepa_desc: Billing runs, pain.008 export, smoothed or pro-rated payment schedules.
feature_documents_desc: Invoices, delivery notes & cancellations are immutable, hashed and GoBD-compliant.
feature_configurable_desc: Many per-CSA settings — time-versioned: changes take effect from a chosen date and previous values are kept as history.
feature_trial_desc: Trial subscription with a seamless move to full membership on the first confirmed cooperative share.
feature_selfservice_desc: Manage your own data, subscriptions, shares, consents and cancellation.
feature_security_desc: Two-factor login, step-up confirmation for sensitive changes, brute-force & rate-limit protection.
feature_multilingual_desc: Interface and emails in German & English (more prepared).
feature_opensource_desc: Open source and available under the GNU AGPLv3 license.
feature_working_lists_desc: Harvest lists, packing lists, picking lists, ...
